hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[univbot] School: %s | Time: %s | Personas: %s | Use /genz to operate."}}' "$(cat config/active-school.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'not set')" "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z')" "$(cat config/personas.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.active | join(", ")' 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"
printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[univbot] Active school: %s"}}' "$(cat config/active-school.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'not set')"
